text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's here! It's finally here! The Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All right! Make sure you keep your eyes on me,
Trainer. In this race, I'll—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Looks like we're facin' off again this year.
Are you ready to eat my dust?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I've got no idea what you're yammerin'
about, Ama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Last year I told you you were gonna eat my
dust, so I used that as a springboard—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You should know me well enough by now. If it's a
fight with me you wish for...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Do it on the track, not with your words.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Then let's go—you and me. At the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh... You've got quite the look in your eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is staring at Triple Crown
champion Narita Brian and the "Queen of the
Amazons" Hishi Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer! I kinda zoned out there!
choice_data_list: They sure do leave an impression, don't they?
They sure do leave an impression, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, cut it out! You can't say that! I'm not gonna
lose!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're not allowed to look at anyone but me
during the race! Got it?
